description: Rachel Conlan, Chief Marketing Officer at Binance, along with other executives, shares New Year greetings and highlights Binance's achievements and future plans for 2025.
topic_summary: Binance executives celebrate the Lunar New Year, reflecting on growth in the Year of the Dragon and outlining plans for 2025, including user protection and innovation in crypto technology. [t=48:53] [t=65:66]
